◎简　　介  

　　Three college students get lost in the seedy streets where they encounter a crazed gang of homeless derelicts that seizes them and one-by-one, horrifically kills all but one man. The surviving man escapes on foot and unarmed, with a pack of depraved transients in pursuit, and only seconds away from capture.
